category_sources: source_facts.description says CommonMark + GFM compatible Markdown parser and renderer; official README says Comrak is a CommonMark and GitHub Flavored Markdown compatible parser and renderer written in Rust.
display_name_sources: Official README heading uses Comrak; source_facts.name is comrak.
docs_sources: Official README links the Comrak project site and includes CLI usage; repository README is an official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/kivikakk/comrak, so repo enrichment was intentionally not changed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Markdown parsing/rendering; official README names CommonMark, GFM, CLI usage, and Rust.
